overview: VIT-AP Student Hub is an honest, student-written guide to VIT-AP University — designed for freshers and prospective students who want real talk, not a college brochure. Written in a personal senior-to-junior tone with section ratings, pros/cons, survival tips, and practical advice on academics, hostel life, food, placements, and more.
features: Hero with honest 'Should you join VIT-AP?' framing
Zomato-style ratings (e.g. 6/10) with pros and cons per section
Survival Guide with expectations vs reality and senior wisdom
Student review cards with raw, honest testimonials
Clean Stripe-inspired layout with Notion-style content blocks
Sections: Academics, Hostel, Food, Campus Life, Placements, FAQs
Photo gallery with admin upload capability
Study Abroad program info (ITP and SAP)
